title: Photosystem II
script_summary: A concise exploration of Photosystem II, revealing its role in photosynthesis without exaggeration.

segments.voiceover: What if I told you plants have a hidden powerhouse?
Meet Photosystem II, the first step in photosynthesis.
It captures light energy and uses it to split water molecules.
This process releases oxygen, vital for life on Earth.
Without Photosystem II, life as we know it would be impossible.
Curious about how else plants work? Hit that follow for more science!
